meaning: n.红木(指黑檀,紫檀等),澳洲蔷薇木
examples: It is being investigated on suspicion of knowingly importing illegal Madagascan rosewood.
Some 500 rosewood logs lay stacked behind a padlocked bamboo fence in a storage lot surrounded by fields of corn and manioc.
The Linley mark is added to veneers of the Continental Flying Spur, cast in Santos rosewood.
Esack, 38, of Rosewood Avenue, Ashford, denied murdering Natalie but admitted manslaughter, claiming diminished responsibility.
He looked down at the floor, at his splayed bare feet planted on the polished rosewood parquet.
